fixture_note_items.description: Valid minimal selected-slice deck by count, trigger, identity, grade setup, and runtime deck_limit.
Rejects a deck without a non-trigger grade 3 setup choice.
Rejects a deck exceeding runtime per-card deck_limit.
Rejects a deck containing a card outside the selected clan identity.
